Name: TYPHON TERROR X2 MAX 2.7-Ton
Description:
Product Overview

Maximize your productivity in confined spaces with the TYPHON TERROR X2 MAX. Engineered for residential work, landscaping, and tight construction zones, this 2.7-ton mini excavator delivers heavy-duty digging power in a remarkably compact frame. With a slim 1,060 mm body width and a fully retractable undercarriage, you can easily navigate narrow pathways without sacrificing stability or performance.

Key Benefits & Features

1. Unmatched Agility for Tight Spaces Navigate and operate where larger machines cannot. The X2 MAX features a 360° continuous body rotation and an articulated boom swing (55° left, 45° right). Combined with a 2,915 mm maximum digging depth and a 2,260 mm unloading height, it offers precision handling in highly restricted areas. An integrated dozer blade further enhances grading capabilities and ground stability.

2. Premium Yanmar Powerhouse Under the hood sits a highly efficient 17.3 kW (24.4 HP) Yanmar 3TNV88F 3-cylinder diesel engine. Designed for strong torque and low emissions, it pairs flawlessly with a 22L hydraulic tank and a 16L fuel tank to keep you running longer with fewer refueling stops.

3. All-Weather Operator Comfort Work comfortably year-round. The fully enclosed cabin includes a built-in Air Conditioner and Heater, an openable front window for fresh air, and bright LED work lights for low-light conditions. The intuitive pilot control system ensures smooth, effortless hydraulic handling.

4. High-Performance Hydraulics Equipped with a premium Danfoss traveling and swing motor, this machine glides across varied terrains at a travel speed of 3.4 km/h. It boasts a 22 kN digging force and a 400 kg boom lifting capacity, making light work of trenching, material handling, and foundation clearing.

5. Ready to Work Out of the Box Your purchase includes essential attachments so you can start working immediately:

  • 1x Standard Digging Bucket (430 mm width / 0.07 m³ capacity)

  • 1x Hydraulic Thumb Clip

  • 1x Hydraulic Oil Cooler

  • 1x Fully Enclosed A/C & Heater Cabin

  • 1x Maintenance Toolbox

  • 1x Digital Instruction Manual

Technical Specifications

  • Operating Weight: 2.7 Tons (approx. 6,000 lbs)

  • Dimensions: 4000 mm (L) × 1350 mm (W) × 2280 mm (H)

  • Undercarriage Width: Retractable from 1,060 mm to 1,350 mm

  • Track Details: 230 mm wide, 1,650 mm track length

  • System Flow: 26 L/min main flow, 13 L/min pilot flow

Why Choose TYPHON Machinery?

Built with globally trusted components, TYPHON equipment guarantees professional-grade toughness. We back every machine with reliable parts availability and dedicated customer support to keep your projects moving without costly downtime.

Name: TYPHON XFLEX-2031EM. It is categorized as a 1.2 Ton Mini Electric Scissor Lift.

With a 6-meter maximum lifting height and a 320 kg (706 lbs) safe working load, it combines silent battery power with a compact 800 mm width to navigate narrow aisles with ease. Designed for durability and safety, it features a telescopic extension deck and a zero-degree inner turning radius for maximum job site efficiency.
Description:
Silent Power and High-Efficiency Performance

The TYPHON XFlex-2031EM is built for the modern industrial workspace, offering zero-emission operation without compromising on power. Driven by a 24V/3.0 kW motor and a robust 12V / 120 Ah dual-battery "Power Core," the machine provides 6 to 8 hours of working time on a single charge. Its rapid 6 to 7-hour charging cycle ensures your equipment is ready for the next shift.

Compact Engineering for Restricted Spaces

Navigating congested warehouses and standard doorways is effortless thanks to its slim 800 mm chassis and foldable fence system.

  • Zero Inner Turning Radius: Allows the lift to pivot in place, critical for narrow-aisle maneuverability.

  • Retractable Height: The overall height reduces from 2050 mm to 1750 mm when the fence is folded, facilitating easy transport and storage.

  • Gradeability: A 25% max climb capability allows the unit to handle ramps and uneven industrial flooring with stability.

Advanced Productivity & Safety Features

The XFlex-2031EM prioritizes the operator's experience with intuitive controls and smart maintenance tools.

  • Telescopic Table Top: Features a foot-operated extension platform that adds 90 cm of horizontal reach, supporting a 113 kg (249 lbs) safety workload.

  • Smart Diagnostics: An integrated digital display provides automatic fault codes and battery status for rapid troubleshooting.

  • Precision Control: The ergonomic control handle offers dual-speed travel, moving at 3.5 KM/H when folded and a safe 0.8 KM/H in a lifted state.

  • Durability: Engineered with high-strength hydraulic tubing, surface-treated steel, and non-marking tires to protect delicate indoor flooring.

Name: Skid Steer 4-in-1 Bucket Attachment
Short description: Skid Steer Loader 4 in one Bucket Attachment is a practical attachment for multi-purpose bucket work. It helps operators handle scooping, clamping, light dozing, back-dragging, grading, and grabbing loose material with one attachment with less manual work, making it useful for contractors, farms, landscaping crews, and property maintenance jobs.
Description:
Skid Steer Loader 4 in one Bucket Attachment

Skid Steer Loader 4 in one Bucket Attachment is made for operators who want to get more value from their skid steer loader without buying another full machine. It focuses on multi-purpose bucket work, giving the machine a clearer role on jobs where speed, control, and practical usability matter. This is a useful choice for contractors, farms, rental fleets, landscapers, property owners, and small crews that need one machine to handle more than one type of work.

Where this attachment works best

On the job, this attachment can help with scooping, clamping, light dozing, back-dragging, grading, and grabbing loose material with one attachment. Instead of depending on hand tools or bringing in a larger machine for every small task, the operator can connect the attachment and keep the work moving. That makes it especially helpful for cleanup days, site preparation, maintenance work, light construction, and jobs where the task changes often during the day.

Key points

  • Helps expand the host machine’s job range
  • Focused on multi-purpose bucket work
  • Useful for contractors, farms, properties, and maintenance crews
  • Simple add-on value without needing another full machine

Why it is useful

The main value of the Skid Steer 4-in-1 Bucket Attachment is its simple function. It is designed to make the host machine more useful while keeping the workflow easy to understand. For buyers comparing attachments, the important points are the job it solves, the machine it will be matched with, the working area, and how often that task comes up. When those things line up, the attachment can save labor and reduce the need for extra equipment on site.

Buyer notes before ordering

Before ordering, check machine compatibility, hydraulic needs if the attachment uses hydraulics, coupler style, working width or tool size, and the type of material you plan to handle. Good fitment helps protect the machine, keeps the attachment easier to use, and gives the operator better results. Basic care such as cleaning dirt after use, checking pins or wear points, inspecting hoses when present, and storing the attachment properly will help it stay ready for future jobs.
